title: Lead Engineer, AI & Business Intelligence
company_focus: Full-funnel media measurement and MarTech platform
description:
About Ovative Group:

Ovative Group is an independent, full-funnel media,
measurement, and creative firm. Leveraging our deep industry
expertise, we help brands like Best Buy, Domino's, American
Eagle, The Home Depot, Post, Disney, Tumi, Michael Kors,
Boost Mobile, and UnitedHealth Group transform their media
and measurement programs. The result? Profitable growth that
speaks for itself.



At Ovative, we don't just track data, we redefine success.
How do we do it? Our proprietary MarTech platform, EMRge
helps businesses transform marketing into a driver of
sustainable growth. Powered by Enterprise Marketing Return
(EMR), our differentiated approach to holistic media buying,
planning, and measurement, EMRge is the first MarTech
platform to measure businesses holistically. We're all about
raising the bar every day, and it shows. Our work has been
recognized by organizations like Digiday, Google, Inc. 5000,
USA Today, and Search Engine Land.

About the Role:

In this role, you will be the technical owner of Ovative’s
AI Analytics Platform, leading the design and delivery of a
Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system and the
supporting services required to make it secure, scalable,
and usable across the business.



This role is intentionally hands-on and requires prior
experience building RAG-style or AI-driven analytics
systems. Ovative is early in this capability area, and this
role is expected to bring proven architectural patterns and
execution experience rather than learning them from scratch.



You will lead the build of platform components that do not
exist today, including document ingestion and storage,
indexing and vector search, semantic modeling, and system
integrations. Many of these capabilities will leverage
Databricks-native services, while others will require
thoughtful integration with enterprise systems such as
Confluence, Slack, and SSO via Entra.



Responsibilities of a Lead Engineer:

- Serve as the technical owner of Ovative’s RAG-based AI
  Analytics Platform, leading the system from initial design
  through production use.

- Partner closely with Product Management to translate
  ambiguous business questions into clear, feasible platform
  capabilities, framing options and tradeoffs (accuracy,
  latency, security, and cost) with clear connection to
  business outcomes

- Design and build new platform components, including:

- Document ingestion and storage services

- Indexing and vector database capabilities

- Semantic layer abstractions for governed analytics

- Orchestration logic coordinating retrieval, SQL generation,
  and model interaction

- Lead integrations with enterprise systems including:

- Authentication and authorization (SSO, entitlements)

- Knowledge sources (e.g., Confluence, internal file stores)

- User interfaces and request channels (e.g., Slack, EMRge, BI
  tools)

- Apply established RAG and AI analytics patterns to prevent
  hallucinations, enforce business logic, and ensure
  traceability of answers.

- Leverage and extend native solutions where appropriate,
  while defining clear system boundaries.

- Follow technical standards for AI safety, access control,
  observability, and cost management.

- Translate business questions into platform capabilities by
  partnering with Product and domain stakeholders.

- Break down complex platform initiatives into sequenced work
  that a small engineering team can execute effectively.

- Mentor other engineers by transferring context and patterns
  as the platform matures.



Experience Needed

Requirements:

- 8+ years of experience in software engineering, data
  engineering, or applied analytics roles.

- Demonstrated experience designing and delivering RAG-based
  systems, search platforms, or AI-powered analytics
  applications in production.

- Experience working with embeddings, vector databases, and
  retrieval pipelines.

- Strong proficiency in Python and SQL, with experience
  building production data or platform services.

- Experience integrating multiple systems and tools (data
  platforms, document systems, authentication, user
  interfaces).

- Experience utilizing large complex datasets in advanced AI
  models to surface insights and recommendations.

- Familiarity with cloud data platforms (AWS, GCP, or Azure);
  experience with Databricks is strongly preferred.

- Strong communication skills and comfort leading technical
  discussions across disciplines.

- Experience partnering with Product Management and
  stakeholders to define platform capabilities, including
  communicating technical feasibility, constraints, and
  tradeoffs to non-technical audiences.



Preferred:

- Experience operating AI systems in governed or compliance-
  sensitive environments.

- Experience building or extending semantic layers for
  analytics or BI.

- Experience integrating enterprise tools such as Confluence,
  Slack, or similar collaboration platforms.

- Exposure to recommendation systems, insight generation, or
  other applied AI use cases beyond Q&A.



Pay Transparency

At Ovative, we offer a transparent view into three core
components of your total compensation package: Base Salary,
Annual Bonus, and Benefits. The salary range for this
position below is inclusive of an annual bonus. Actual
offers are made with consideration for relevant experience
and anticipated impact. Additional benefits information is
provided below.

For our Lead Engineer positions, our compensation ranges
from $111,000 to $186,000, which is inclusive of a 25%
bonus.

Benefits of Working at Ovative Group:

We provide strong, competitive, holistic benefits that
understand the importance of your life inside and out of
work. 

Culture: 

Culture matters and we’ve been recognized as a Top Workplace
for ten years running because of it. We demand trust and
transparency from each other. We believe in doing the hard
and complicated work others put off. We’re open in
communication and floor plan. We’re flat – our interns sit
next to VPs, our analysts work closely with senior leaders,
and our CEO interacts with every single person daily. Put
together, these elements help foster an environment where
smart people can support each other in performing to their
highest potential. 

Ovative is committed to fostering an inclusive environment
where everyone can participate and thrive. We do not
tolerate discrimination of any kind, including on the basis
of race, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender
expression. Our policies reflect this commitment—for
example, our medical leave benefits are inclusive of same-
sex partners, ensuring equitable care and support for all
families.

Compensation and Insurance: 

We strive to hire and retain the best talent. Paying fair,
competitive compensation, with a large bonus incentive, and
phenomenal health insurance is an important part of this
mix. 

We’re rewarded fairly and when the company performs well, we
all benefit. 



Tangible amenities we enjoy: 

- Access to all office spaces in MSP, NYC, and CHI

- Frequent, paid travel to our Minneapolis headquarters for
  company events, team events, and in-person collaboration
  with teams

- Generous paid vacation policy

- 401k match program

- Top-notch health insurance options, inclusive of same sex
  partners

- Family formation benefits including reimbursement options
  for fertility, pregnancy, and parenting needs

- Monthly stipend for your mobile phone and data plan

- Sabbatical program

- Charitable giving via our time and a financial match program

- Shenanigan’s Day



Working at Ovative won’t be easy, but if you like getting
your hands dirty, driving results, and being surrounded by
the best talent, it’ll be the most rewarding job you’ll ever
have. If you think you can make us better, we want to hear
from you!
responsibilities: Serve as the technical owner of Ovative's RAG-based AI Analytics Platform, leading the system from initial design through production use
Partner with Product Management to translate ambiguous business questions into clear platform capabilities, framing technical tradeoffs and business outcomes
Design and build new platform components including document ingestion and storage services, indexing and vector database capabilities, semantic layer abstractions, and orchestration logic

Lead integrations with enterprise systems including authentication/authorization (SSO, entitlements), knowledge sources (Confluence, internal file stores), and user interfaces (Slack, EMRge, BI tools)
Apply established RAG and AI analytics patterns to prevent hallucinations, enforce business logic, and ensure traceability of answers

Break down complex platform initiatives into sequenced work that a small engineering team can execute effectively

use_cases: Enterprise analytics platform that provides AI-driven insights and recommendations from complex datasets
RAG-based system for querying business intelligence data and documentation with semantic search capabilities
Integration with business tools (Confluence, Slack, EMRge) to surface insights through familiar user interfaces
Marketing measurement and media optimization through holistic data analysis and AI-powered recommendations
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on technical role responsible for building
and deploying a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system
from scratch. The engineer will directly implement AI
components including document ingestion, vector databases,
semantic modeling, and orchestration of model interactions -
not just supporting infrastructure.
